columns.name: time
columns.description: Time at which the audit log was recorded (ISO format).

columns.name: auth_type
columns.description: Authentication method used for the event (basic_auth, gui, daemon, or null for internal events).

columns.name: cloud_event_id
columns.description: Unique cloud event identifier for the audit log entry.

columns.name: upcloud_correlation_id
columns.description: Unique ID given to the event. Can occur multiple times for separate audit log events.

columns.name: resource_type
columns.description: Type of resource such as account, auth, server, storage, managed-database, etc.

columns.name: resource_sub_type
columns.description: Sub-type of the resource providing additional context (e.g., session-api-token, api-token, service).

columns.name: action
columns.description: Action performed on the resource (create, read, update, delete, access-update, attach, detach, login, logout).

columns.name: origin
columns.description: Origin of the interface where the event was triggered (api, gui, or upcloud_internal).

columns.name: account_username
columns.description: Username of the account or subaccount performing the event.

columns.name: ip_address
columns.description: Source IP address of the event, if one could be determined.

columns.name: resource_id
columns.description: The UUID of the resource that the audit log relates to.

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(['time'])
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    AuthType = auth_type,
    CloudEventId = cloud_event_id,
    UpcloudCorrelationId = upcloud_correlation_id,
    ResourceType = resource_type,
    ResourceSubType = resource_sub_type,
    Action = action,
    Origin = origin,
    AccountUsername = account_username,
    IpAddress = ip_address,
    UpCloudResourceId = resource_id
